description: Create a content slide comparing traditional vs platform thinking in a two-column layout, with process-style diagrams and supporting bullet lists plus an example footer strip.

header.kicker: 3. Digital Transformation – The digital economy is here
header.headline: In the digital economy platform thinking is the foundation for new value creation – Leveraging network effects is key to success

rows: Traditional one-way pipe business models; Upstream production and downstream consumption of value; Content is added incrementally
Creation of two-sided networks; Co-creation of value by harvesting resources and capacity of an ecosystem you do not need to own; Content is added exponentially
Example: HBO – Premium cable and satellite television network providing self-produced TV series, movies and other entertainment content
